section_title: Assault or criminal force on grave provocation.
chapter_title: Of Offences Affecting The Human Body
text:
Whoever assaults or uses criminal force to any person on grave and sudden provocation given by that person, shall be punished with simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to one month, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both. 
 Explanation: This section is subject to the same Explanation as section 129 . 
 BNSS Classification 
 Simple imprisonment for one month, or fine of 1,000 rupees, or both. 
 Non-cognizable 
 Bailable 
 Triable by Any Magistrate.
